purpose: Make the major public-surface decisions explicit so reviewers and contributors can see why the public specs repository is shaped the way it is.

decisions.summary: The repository is intentionally a public specs and contract surface, not a dump of the full private N1Hub runtime.
decisions.rationale: A narrow public projection is safer to review, easier to maintain, and more credible than exposing private runtime internals or operator state.
bounded_non_goals: does not claim to expose the full private runtime
does not promise that every internal domain is published here

decisions.summary: Schemas, OpenAPI, raw capsules, provenance, and validator-backed checks outrank reviewer-friendly summaries.
decisions.rationale: Reviewer convenience layers are useful only if they remain subordinate to stronger contracts and verification surfaces.
bounded_non_goals: does not claim every summary is equally authoritative
does not replace live validator behavior with prose

decisions.summary: Examples are synthetic and public-safe instead of copied from private vault data.
decisions.rationale: Synthetic examples preserve explainability and verification value without leaking personal data, internal plans, or private graph state.
bounded_non_goals: does not claim examples are real user data
does not expose private vault contents for realism

decisions.summary: The repository publishes many machine-readable reviewer layers instead of relying only on prose docs.
decisions.rationale: Structured reviewer surfaces make public maturity, evidence, coverage, and limits testable instead of subjective.
bounded_non_goals: does not claim that machine-readable summaries replace stronger contracts
does not claim reviewer convenience is more important than source integrity

decisions.summary: Portability and no-lock-in are expressed through public contracts, not only through marketing language.
decisions.rationale: Trust grows when portability is tied to visible archive/schema surfaces and explicit non-goals instead of slogans.
bounded_non_goals: does not claim a hosted export/import service already exists
does not claim runtime portability beyond published contracts

decisions.summary: The public projection is maintained through provenance, release evidence, and repo-local verification rather than ad hoc exports.
decisions.rationale: A public trust artifact remains credible only if release discipline and projection discipline are visible and repeatable.
bounded_non_goals: does not claim zero drift without ongoing maintenance
does not expose private maintainer workflows as public doctrine

non_claims: This file does not claim to capture every internal historical discussion or unpublished runtime decision.
This file does not replace stronger contracts, provenance, release evidence, or live validator behavior.
